_comment: AVD-EnvironmentHealth configuration template. Copy per client/environment — e.g. config.contoso-prod.json. Do NOT commit populated copies containing real subscriptionId/tenantId to a public repo.
_how_arrays_work: All *Names fields accept a JSON array (preferred) or a single string. The script also accepts comma-separated values in the matching environment variable.
clientName: <Client or Business Unit Name — shown in report header and output filename>
subscriptionId: <Azure Subscription GUID — leave blank to use the current Az context subscription>
tenantId: <Azure AD Tenant GUID — leave blank to use the current Az context tenant>
resourceGroupNames: <Resource Group 1 containing AVD host pools / session host VMs>
<Resource Group 2 — add or remove entries as needed>
_resourceGroupNames_note: Single-RG environments can supply one element. Legacy single-string key 'resourceGroupName' is also accepted for backward compatibility.
_section_anf: Azure NetApp Files (used when profileStorageType is ANF or Both)
anfResourceGroupNames: <Resource Group containing ANF accounts — e.g. rg-anf-prod>
<Add more RGs if ANF accounts span multiple resource groups, or remove this entry>
_anfResourceGroupNames_note: Leave as empty array [] to scan subscription-wide for all ANF accounts.
_section_azfiles: Azure Files / Storage Account (used when profileStorageType is AzureFiles or Both)
storageResourceGroupNames: <Resource Group 1 containing FSLogix Azure Files storage accounts>
<Resource Group 2 — add or remove as needed>
_storageResourceGroupNames_note: Leave as empty array [] to scan the entire subscription. Takes precedence over storageAccountNames if both are set.
storageAccountNames: <Specific Storage Account name 2 — e.g. stavdprofiles02, or remove this entry>
_storageAccountNames_note: Optional. If provided, only these accounts are assessed (within the configured storageResourceGroupNames, or subscription-wide if that list is empty). Leave as empty array [] to assess ALL accounts in storageResourceGroupNames.
_quotaWarningPercent_note: Volumes or shares at or above this usage % are flagged WARN. Default: 80.
_defaultRegion_note: Fallback Azure region used only when a region cannot be derived from a live resource (e.g., Marketplace AMA version lookups when no session hosts exist yet).
brandDisplayName: <Short client/org name shown in report header — leave blank to omit>
_brandColor_note: Hex colour applied to the brand wordmark. Default: #3B82F6 (blue).
